primary_text:
Heritage pork from Bundarra Berkshires, outdoor-raised in Bundarra NSW.

Wild-caught salmon from Collins Wild Caught on the South Coast.

Bio-dynamic dairy from Paris Creek Farms in Meadows SA.

Every product on FarmThru comes from a named farm. You know exactly what you're eating, where it came from, and who raised it.

50+ regenerative farms. Collected fresh from your local hub. No middlemen, no mystery.

We'll show you where your food comes from.
headline: Real farms, real names, real food
description: Heritage pork, wild-caught salmon, bio-dynamic dairy. All from named farms.
creative_brief: Grid of three product shots with farm name labels. Clean, editorial. Each product sits on its origin story: farm name, location, method.
